results.title: “There’s a massive amount of money.....": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s secret wedding plans spark ‘cloak and dagger’ frenzy across America
results.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s highly secretive wedding plans have sparked massive online fascination, with fans obsessing over possible venues, guest lists, and security measures. Reports suggest the couple may use decoy locations, strict no-phone rules, and heavy privacy tactics to avoid leaks and paparazzi. Experts say the intense secrecy is intentional as public curiosity surrounding the celebrity power couple continues to grow across social media and entertainment circles.

results.title: Cannavaro asks ‘why only us?’ after Uzbekistan searched on World Cup arrival
results.description: Italy's 2006 World Cup winner says his squad was the only team put through a search with sniffer dogs and metal wands on arrival. Senegal received similar treatment on the tarmac.

results.title: Modi Becomes India’s Longest-Serving Elected Prime Minister, Surpassing Nehru’s Record
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has become India’s longest-serving elected Prime Minister, surpassing Jawaharlal Nehru’s 4,398-day record since 1952–1964. His tenure, beginning in 2014 and strengthened by victories in 2019 and 2024, includes major reforms such as Jan Dhan, GST, UPI expansion, rural electrification, and major airport growth.

results.title: Equity mutual fund inflows fall to 1-year low in May; SIP contributions stay above ₹30,900 crore
results.description: Equity mutual fund inflows dropped to a one-year low in May 2026 as geopolitical tensions and elevated crude oil prices prompted investors to turn cautious. Despite the moderation, SIP contributions stayed above ₹30,900 crore, highlighting the resilience of long-term retail participation.
